tools.name: airtable_health
tools.description: Check the health of the service.

tools.name: airtable_list_bases
tools.description: List all accessible Airtable bases.

tools.name: airtable_list_tables
tools.description: List all tables in a specific base.

tools.name: airtable_describe_table
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific table.

tools.name: airtable_create_table
tools.description: Create a new table in a base.

tools.name: airtable_update_table
tools.description: Update a table's schema (name and/or description).

tools.name: airtable_create_field
tools.description: Create a new field in a table.

tools.name: airtable_update_field
tools.description: Update a field in a table. Field type cannot be changed.

tools.name: airtable_list_records
tools.description: List records from a specified Airtable table.

tools.name: airtable_get_record
tools.description: Get a specific record by ID.

tools.name: airtable_create_record
tools.description: Create a new record in a table.

tools.name: airtable_update_records
tools.description: Update one or more records in a table (max 10 per call).

tools.name: airtable_delete_records
tools.description: Delete one or more records from a table.

tools.name: airtable_search_records
tools.description: Search for records containing specific value in a field.

tools.name: airtable_show_data
tools.description: Show raw data as JSON for debugging.

tools.name: blackline_health
tools.description: Check the health of the service.

tools.name: blackline_list_reconciliations
tools.description: List reconciliations.

tools.name: blackline_create_reconciliation
tools.description: Create a draft reconciliation (state=open).

tools.name: blackline_get_reconciliation
tools.description: Retrieve a single reconciliation by ID.

tools.name: blackline_update_reconciliation_variances
tools.description: Replace variance lines on a draft / in_progress reconciliation.

tools.name: blackline_submit_reconciliation
tools.description: Submit an in_progress reconciliation for senior review.

tools.name: blackline_approve_reconciliation
tools.description: Senior approves a submitted reconciliation (Four-Eyes).

tools.name: blackline_return_reconciliation
tools.description: Return a submitted reconciliation to the preparer.

tools.name: blackline_certify_reconciliation
tools.description: Manager certifies an approved reconciliation.

tools.name: blackline_archive_reconciliation
tools.description: Archive a certified reconciliation into the PBC binder.

tools.name: blackline_attach_evidence
tools.description: Attach evidence to a reconciliation (by ``document_id`` preferred).

tools.name: blackline_list_review_notes
tools.description: List review notes attached to a reconciliation.

tools.name: blackline_create_review_note
tools.description: Leave a review note on a reconciliation.

tools.name: blackline_clear_review_note
tools.description: Preparer clears an open review note with a response narrative.

tools.name: blackline_reopen_review_note
tools.description: Reviewer reopens a previously cleared review note.

tools.name: blackline_list_exceptions
tools.description: List exceptions in the BlackLine Exception Tracker.

tools.name: blackline_create_exception
tools.description: Log a new exception.

tools.name: blackline_get_exception
tools.description: Retrieve a single exception by ID.

tools.name: blackline_update_exception
tools.description: Update investigation findings on an exception.

tools.name: blackline_resolve_exception
tools.description: Approve and execute an exception's resolution.

tools.name: blackline_list_close_tasks
tools.description: List close tasks (filterable by period, owner, status).

tools.name: blackline_update_close_task_status
tools.description: Update a close task's status.

tools.name: blackline_get_close_task_checklist
tools.description: Get the per-item checklist for a close task.

tools.name: blackline_get_close_status_dashboard
tools.description: Real-time close-status dashboard for a fiscal period.

tools.name: blackline_list_sox_controls
tools.description: List SOX 302/404/FFIEC/SEC S-X controls.

tools.name: blackline_get_sox_control
tools.description: Get a single SOX control's detail.

tools.name: blackline_get_audit_trail
tools.description: Get who-did-what-when for a reconciliation, exception, or close task.

tools.name: blackline_list_archived_reconciliations
tools.description: List archived reconciliations (the PBC binder feed).

tools.name: blackline_get_archived_reconciliation
tools.description: Get a single archived reconciliation (PBC handoff record).

tools.name: blackline_show_data
tools.description: Dump all BlackLine state - for debugging.

tools.name: blackline_reset
tools.description: Reset the BlackLine database to its seeded state.

tools.name: calendar_health
tools.description: Check the health of the service.

tools.name: calendar_add_calendar_event
tools.description: Add a calendar event.

tools.description: Get a calendar event by ID.

tools.description: Delete a calendar event.

tools.name: calendar_get_calendar_events_from_to
tools.description: Get events that overlap with a date range.

tools.name: calendar_read_today_calendar_events
tools.description: Read today's calendar events.

tools.name: calendar_get_all_tags
tools.description: Get all unique tags.

tools.name: calendar_get_calendar_events_by_tag
tools.description: Get events by tag.

tools.name: calendar_search_events
tools.description: Search events by query in title, description, location, and attendees.

tools.name: calendar_edit_calendar_event
tools.description: Edit a calendar event.

tools.name: calendar_respond_to_event
tools.description: Set an attendee's RSVP for an event.

tools.name: calendar_show_data
tools.description: Show raw calendar data.

tools.name: contacts_health
tools.description: Check the health of the service.

tools.name: contacts_get_contacts
tools.description: Get contacts list with pagination.

tools.description: Get a specific contact by ID.

tools.name: contacts_add_new_contact
tools.description: Add a new contact.

tools.name: contacts_edit_contact
tools.description: Edit a contact's fields.

tools.name: contacts_delete_contact
tools.description: Delete a contact.

tools.name: contacts_search_contacts
tools.description: Search contacts by name, phone, or email.

tools.name: contacts_show_data
tools.description: Show raw contacts data.

tools.name: email_health
tools.description: Check the health of the service.

tools.name: email_list_emails
tools.description: List emails in a folder with pagination support.

tools.name: email_get_email_by_id
tools.description: Get an email by its unique ID.

tools.name: email_get_email_by_index
tools.description: Get an email by its index position in a folder.

tools.name: email_send_email
tools.description: Send an email to the specified recipients.

tools.name: email_reply_to_email
tools.description: Reply to an existing email.

tools.name: email_forward_email
tools.description: Forward an existing email to new recipients.

tools.name: email_move_email
tools.description: Move an email from one folder to another.

tools.name: email_delete_email
tools.description: Delete an email by moving it to the TRASH folder.

tools.name: email_search_emails
tools.description: Search for emails in a folder based on a query string.

tools.name: email_show_data
tools.description: Show raw email data as JSON.

tools.name: email_list_jmap_emails
tools.description: List emails in RFC8621 JMAP format.

tools.name: email_get_jmap_email
tools.description: Get single email in RFC8621 JMAP format.

tools.name: email_set_email_keywords
tools.description: Update email keywords/flags.

tools.name: email_list_mailboxes
tools.description: Get all mailboxes with counts and metadata.

tools.name: email_get_mailbox
tools.description: Get mailbox by ID with current counts.

tools.name: email_get_thread
tools.description: Get conversation thread with all related emails.

tools.name: email_get_email_threads
tools.description: List threads in a specific mailbox.

tools.name: messaging_health
tools.description: Check the health of the service.

tools.name: messaging_send_message
tools.description: Send a message to a user. Creates a new conversation if none exists.

tools.name: messaging_send_message_to_conversation
tools.description: Send a message to an existing conversation.

tools.name: messaging_list_conversations
tools.description: List conversations sorted by last updated time.

tools.name: messaging_get_conversation
tools.description: Get a conversation with its messages.

tools.description: Search conversations by title, participant names, or message content.

tools.name: messaging_add_user_to_conversation
tools.description: Add a user to an existing conversation.

tools.name: oracle_gl_health
tools.description: Check the health of the service.

tools.name: oracle_gl_list_accounts
tools.description: List GL accounts (chart of accounts).

tools.name: oracle_gl_get_account
tools.description: Retrieve a single GL account.

tools.name: oracle_gl_list_entities
tools.description: List all entities this GL holds data for.

tools.name: oracle_gl_get_account_balance
tools.description: Get an account balance for a fiscal period.

tools.name: oracle_gl_list_journal_entries
tools.description: List journal entries with optional filters.

tools.name: oracle_gl_get_journal_entry
tools.description: Retrieve a single journal entry by ID with all lines and audit trail.

tools.name: oracle_gl_create_journal_entry
tools.description: Create a draft journal entry.

tools.name: oracle_gl_submit_journal_entry
tools.description: Submit a draft journal entry for review.

tools.name: oracle_gl_approve_journal_entry
tools.description: Approve a submitted journal entry (Four-Eyes).

tools.name: oracle_gl_reject_journal_entry
tools.description: Return a submitted journal entry to the preparer with comments.

tools.name: oracle_gl_post_journal_entry
tools.description: Post an approved journal entry to the GL.

tools.name: oracle_gl_reverse_journal_entry
tools.description: Create a reversing journal entry for a posted entry.

tools.name: oracle_gl_get_trial_balance
tools.description: Get the trial balance for a fiscal period.

tools.name: oracle_gl_list_transactions
tools.description: List GL transactions (line-level drill-through).

tools.name: oracle_gl_get_transaction
tools.description: Retrieve a single posted GL line by ID.

tools.name: oracle_gl_list_subledger_feeds
tools.description: List configured sub-ledger feeds (e.g., SAP -> Oracle (AP)).

tools.name: oracle_gl_get_subledger_feed
tools.description: Retrieve a single sub-ledger feed configuration.

tools.name: oracle_gl_list_subledger_feed_runs
tools.description: List recent runs for a sub-ledger feed.

tools.name: oracle_gl_get_subledger_feed_run
tools.description: Retrieve a single sub-ledger feed run with status, row counts,

tools.name: oracle_gl_retry_subledger_feed_run
tools.description: Retry a failed sub-ledger feed run.

tools.name: oracle_gl_list_fiscal_periods
tools.description: List fiscal periods with BD3 lock state and regulatory deadlines.

tools.name: oracle_gl_get_fiscal_period
tools.description: Retrieve a fiscal period including BD3 lock state and BD5 deadline.

tools.name: oracle_gl_get_close_calendar
tools.description: Get the close calendar for a fiscal period.

tools.name: oracle_gl_lock_fiscal_period
tools.description: Execute the GL close lock (BD3 6pm ET).

tools.name: oracle_gl_unlock_fiscal_period
tools.description: Unlock a locked fiscal period (VP only).

tools.name: oracle_gl_show_data
tools.description: Show all data in the system for debugging.

tools.name: oracle_gl_reset
tools.description: Reset Oracle GL to its initial state.

tools.name: records_vault_health
tools.description: Check the health of the service.

tools.description: List documents with optional filters.

tools.description: Upload a new document with retention metadata.

tools.name: records_vault_get_document
tools.description: Get document metadata (no bytes).

tools.name: records_vault_update_document_metadata
tools.description: Update mutable metadata on a document.

tools.name: records_vault_download_document_content
tools.description: Download document bytes (defaults to current version).

tools.name: records_vault_purge_document
tools.description: Purge a document past retention with no active legal hold.

tools.name: records_vault_list_document_versions
tools.description: List all versions of a document, chronological.

tools.name: records_vault_add_document_version
tools.description: Add a new version to an existing document.

tools.name: records_vault_get_document_version
tools.description: Get metadata for a specific version of a document.

tools.name: records_vault_list_retention_policies
tools.description: List the catalog of retention policies the vault enforces.

tools.name: records_vault_get_retention_policy
tools.description: Get a single retention policy by code.

tools.name: records_vault_list_legal_holds
tools.description: List legal holds with optional filters.

tools.name: records_vault_place_legal_hold
tools.description: Place a legal hold on a document.

tools.name: records_vault_release_legal_hold
tools.description: Release a legal hold (Legal/Compliance role required).

tools.name: records_vault_list_chain_of_custody
tools.description: List chain-of-custody events for a document, chronological.

tools.name: records_vault_list_access_grants
tools.description: List time-bounded access grants with optional filters.

tools.name: records_vault_create_access_grant
tools.description: Create a time-bounded read grant for a single document.

tools.name: records_vault_revoke_access_grant
tools.description: Revoke an active access grant before its natural expiry.

tools.name: records_vault_show_data
tools.description: Debug tool: dump every table.

tools.name: records_vault_reset
tools.description: Reset the vault to its initial seeded state.
